title: Active Recon Starter Workflow
when_to_use: When moving from passive to active reconnaissance with proper authorisation

steps.title: Confirm Authorisation
steps.instruction: Confirm written authorisation exists and is stored securely
steps.tip: Never proceed without this step. Keep a copy accessible during testing

steps.title: Define Scope
steps.instruction: Define scope: target IPs, domains, ports, timeframe
steps.tip: Write it down. Refer to it before every command. Scope creep is a legal liability

steps.title: Ping Sweep
steps.instruction: Ping sweep the target range: nmap -sn [range]
steps.tip: If ICMP is blocked, try TCP SYN discovery: nmap -sn -PS22,80,443 [range]

steps.title: Record Live Hosts
steps.instruction: Identify live hosts and record their IPs
steps.tip: Create a target list file. Use -iL flag in subsequent scans to load it automatically

steps.title: Quick Port Scan
steps.instruction: For each live host, perform a quick port scan: nmap -F [host]
steps.tip: -F scans the 100 most common ports. Fast initial sweep before deeper scanning

steps.title: Log Everything
steps.instruction: Record all findings with timestamps in your engagement log
steps.tip: Use a consistent log format. Include: timestamp, command, target, result summary

steps.title: Stay in Scope
steps.instruction: Never scan outside the authorised scope
steps.tip: If you discover something interesting outside scope, note it and discuss with the client — never scan it
